description: Home automation service contract v1 — 14 operations across state, history, control, and environmental monitoring.

operations.description: List known entities and their domains
operations.name: entity_list

operations.description: Get current state of an entity
operations.name: entity_state

operations.description: Query state history for an entity over a time range
operations.name: entity_history

operations.description: Set HVAC temperature, mode, or fan speed
operations.name: climate_set

operations.description: Turn lights on/off, set brightness or colour
operations.name: light_control

operations.description: List configured automations and their state
operations.name: automation_list

operations.description: Lock or unlock a door lock
operations.name: lock_control

operations.description: Arm, disarm, or trigger an alarm panel
operations.name: alarm_control

operations.description: Capture a still image from a camera entity
operations.name: camera_snapshot

operations.description: Get energy consumption, production, and cost data
operations.name: energy_stats

operations.description: Create or delete an automation rule
operations.name: automation_create

title: home-v1
